# TapTrao

> TapTrao helps small importers understand compliance requirements before spending money on a shipment, then provides a one-off per-shipment "Shield" pack to request missing supplier documents, manage documents (including LC cross-check), and monitor compliance risk until docking and release.

## What TapTrao does

- **Free Corridor Preview**: Users can enter their trade corridor on the homepage to instantly see a compliance readiness score and the first 3 regulatory requirements for free. Unlocking the full checklist, supplier messaging, and audit tools requires Shield.
- **Pre-shipment compliance requirements**: Identifies every document, duty rate, and regulatory trigger needed before purchase or shipment. Covers EUDR, CBAM, SPS, IUU, CITES, Kimberley Process, Lacey Act, REACH, Section 232, FSIS, and Conflict Minerals.
- **EUDR due diligence**: Automated due diligence statements for EU Deforestation Regulation reporting, including geolocation data capture.
- **Supplier document requests**: Generate zero-login upload links for suppliers — they see exactly which documents to provide from their phone, no account needed.
- **Document vault and LC cross-check**: Upload shipment documents and cross-validate Letters of Credit against UCP 600 rules. Flags discrepancies before bank submission.
- **TwinLog audit trail**: Every compliance event recorded with SHA-256 integrity hashing for audit-proof evidence records.
- **Trade templates**: Save and reuse compliance corridors with automatic stale-detection when regulations change.
- **Regulatory alerts**: Monitor up to 3 corridors for regulatory changes (EUDR deadlines, duty rate updates, SPS rule changes).
- **Demurrage calculator**: Estimate port demurrage costs based on destination and readiness verdict.

## Coverage

- **191 commodities**: cocoa, coffee, cashew nuts, shea butter, sesame seeds, timber, rubber, cotton, gold, diamonds, vanilla, tea, tobacco, palm oil, and 177 more
- **54 African origin countries**: Ghana, Cote d'Ivoire, Nigeria, Kenya, Tanzania, Ethiopia, Uganda, Cameroon, Senegal, Madagascar, Mozambique, DRC, Rwanda, Burkina Faso, and 40 more
- **7 destination markets**: EU, UK, USA, Canada, Switzerland, Turkiye, UAE
- Automatically checks AfCFTA Rules of Origin eligibility and AGOA (African Growth and Opportunity Act) status

## Pricing (USD)

- **TapTrao Shield — Single shipment**: $189
- **3-Pack**: $499 ($166 per shipment)
- **5-Pack**: $799 ($160 per shipment)
- **LC-only check**: $49.99 (standalone, without Shield)
- **LC check is included free** with every Shield pack

No subscription. No contract. No ERP integration required. No account needed — sessions are cookie-based.

## Who it's for

- Small to medium EU/UK/US commodity importers who want to stay on the phone doing deals while the platform handles the administrative paper-chase
- Traders who need to understand regulatory requirements before committing to a purchase
- Importers coordinating with overseas suppliers for missing export/import documents
- Companies using letters of credit who need document cross-checking and an audit trail
- Anyone preparing for EUDR (30 Dec 2025) or CBAM (1 Jan 2026) enforcement

## Key regulatory dates

- **EUDR**: Entry into application 30 December 2025 for large/medium operators; 30 June 2026 for micro/small enterprises
- **CBAM**: Fully operational from 1 January 2026
- **UK Border Target Operating Model**: Full SPS checks on all food/plant imports

## Optional

### Blog articles

- [Sesame Seeds from Nigeria: Compliance Guide](https://taptrao.com/blog/sesame-seeds-nigeria)
- [Cocoa and EUDR: What Importers Need to Know](https://taptrao.com/blog/cocoa-eudr-importers)
- [Tropical Fruits: Phytosanitary Requirements](https://taptrao.com/blog/tropical-fruits-phytosanitary)
- [Bamboo as a Forest Product Under EUDR](https://taptrao.com/blog/bamboo-eudr-forest-product)

### Regulatory detail

- **EUDR & CBAM**: Maps exact implementation dates and requirements for the EU Deforestation Regulation and Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism.
- **SPS**: Automatically flags Sanitary and Phytosanitary certificate requirements based on commodity and origin-destination pairing.
- **Conflict Minerals**: Dodd-Frank 3TG due diligence for tin, tantalum, tungsten, and gold from conflict-affected regions.

### Technical details

- **TwinLog hashing**: SHA-256 cryptographic hashing for immutable, audit-proof compliance history.
- **LC cross-check**: Aligns with UCP 600 and ISBP standards for Letter of Credit document validation.
- **Readiness scoring**: 0–100 score based on regulatory complexity, hazard exposure, document volume, and trade restrictions.
